expectations.text: All 4 artifact files exist (requirements.md, test-skeletons.md, traceability.md, ambiguity-report.md)
expectations.evidence: All 4 files present: requirements.md (17KB), test-skeletons.md (18KB), traceability.md (6KB), ambiguity-report.md (7KB)

expectations.text: User Story IDs match US-XXX-XXX format
expectations.evidence: Uses US-1, US-2, ..., US-9 format (simple numbering). Not US-XXX-XXX vbounce format. 10 US-\d+ occurrences
94 GIVEN/WHEN/THEN clause matches in requirements.md. All ACs use proper format

expectations.text: At least 3 ACs per user story
expectations.evidence: 30 ACs across 9 stories = 3.3 ACs per story average

expectations.text: NFRs have measurable thresholds with NFR-XXX-XXX IDs
expectations.evidence: Uses NFR-1, NFR-2, ..., NFR-6 format (simple numbering). Not NFR-XXX-XXX vbounce format. 6 NFRs with measurable thresholds but wrong ID convention

expectations.text: Test skeleton IDs match T-AC-XXX format
expectations.evidence: Uses TEST-1.1, TEST-2.1 format. Not T-AC-XXX vbounce format. 33 test skeletons total

expectations.text: Traceability matrix links PRD -> Story -> AC -> Test with no orphans
expectations.evidence: Bidirectional traceability matrix with PRD Feature -> Story -> AC -> Test mapping. Coverage summary states 0 orphans, 0 untested criteria
8 ambiguities identified. All story-level scores below 50 (average 26.7, max 40)

expectations.text: Step 3: Separate QG verdict file with QG-REQ-* ID and per-criterion PASS/WARN/FAIL
expectations.evidence: No separate QG verdict file. Quality self-assessment is embedded in requirements.md as section '3. Quality Self-Assessment' — not a separate agent output

expectations.text: Step 3: QG is clearly separate agent role (not self-check embedded in requirements)
expectations.evidence: Quality assessment is a self-check inside requirements.md, not a separate agent invocation

expectations.text: Step 4: Human review summary presented with artifacts and QG verdict
expectations.evidence: No explicit human review presentation step. Output is a direct dump of all artifacts

expectations.text: Step 6: Knowledge capture file exists with phase learnings
expectations.evidence: No separate knowledge capture file. A brief 'Knowledge Capture Summary' is embedded in requirements.md section 4

expectations.text: Step 6: Traceability update confirmed (matrix initialized with phase completion marker)
expectations.evidence: No phase completion marker or traceability initialization confirmation. Matrix exists but no lifecycle metadata

summary: 5/13 assertions passed. Baseline produces good artifacts (4 files, GIVEN-WHEN-THEN ACs, traceability matrix, ambiguity scoring) but misses all vbounce-specific conventions: ID formats (US-XXX-XXX, NFR-XXX-XXX, T-AC-XXX), separate QG agent, phase anatomy steps (review presentation, knowledge capture, traceability lifecycle).
